name: How to add your hotel to Zillow.com
description: Learn how to get your hotel listed on Zillow.com and reach millions of potential guests. Follow our step-by-step guide to add your hotel today!
main_title: How to add your hotel to Zillow.com
richtext:
What is Zillow.com and why is it important?

Zillow.com is a popular real estate website where you can list your property for sale or rent. Listing on Zillow can help your property get more visibility and attract potential buyers or renters. The website offers helpful tools and resources to market your property and provides valuable data and analytics about the real estate market.

‍

Step-by-step guide to add your business to Zillow.com

‍

  1. Go to the Zillow website (https://www.zillow.com/) and click the “Manage Rentals” link from the top right corner of the homepage.

‍

  1. Click “List your property for free” button

‍

  1. Create a Zillow account if you don't already have one. You can sign up using your email address or Apple, Facebook, Google account.

‍

  1. Once you have created an account, you will be on the Zillow Rental Manager page. 

‍

  1. Click “Next”, Once you have filled out your name and property details.

‍

  1. Add your property address and click “Next”

‍

  1. Click “Confirm” once you have verified your property address.

‍

  1. You have successfully added your property. Now you can list it for rent and use Zillow rental manager to manage it. Click “Create Listing” button to list your property in Zillow website. 

‍

  1. Click “Get Started” and Fill out the details of your rental property, including the rental details, lease, media, amenities and contact information.

‍

  1. Review your listing and make any necessary changes or corrections.

‍

  1. Submit your listing for review. Zillow will review your listing and may contact you for additional information or clarification.

‍

  1. Once your listing is approved, it will be published on Zillow.com and will be visible to potential renters.

‍

In conclusion, listing your property on a popular online real estate marketplace like Zillow.com can increase its visibility and attract potential buyers or renters. However, there are other websites like Lodging-World.com that offer similar services for listing your property. If you are interested in listing your property on a platform like Zillow.com, you may also consider checking out Lodging-World.com. They provide a similar service and can help you reach a wider audience of potential renters or buyers.
